title: Phillaur Fort
tagline: Phillaur Fort — heritage city of Punjab

overview.short: Phillaur Fort or Maharaja Ranjit Singh Fort is located on the Grand Trunk Road in Phillaur, Punjab, India.
overview.description: Phillaur Fort or Maharaja Ranjit Singh Fort is located on the Grand Trunk Road in Phillaur, Punjab, India.

topPlaces.name: Garha, Phillaur
topPlaces.description: Garha is a large village in Phillaur tehsil of Jalandhar District of Punjab State, India. It is situated on Phillaur-Nawanshahr road 1 km away from Phillaur, 45 km from Jalandhar and 120 km from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Achan Chak
topPlaces.description: Achan Chak is a small size village in Phillaur tehsil of Jalandhar District of Punjab State, India. It is located 8 km from Nagar, 3 km from Phillaur, 48 km from Jalandhar and 116 km from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Ramgarh, Jalandhar
topPlaces.description: Ramgarh (Punjabi: ਰਾਮਗੜ੍ਹ) is a medium size village in Phillaur tehsil of Jalandhar District of Punjab State, India. It is located 1 km (walking distance) away from postal head office Phillaur, 16 km from Ludhiana, 45 km from district headquarter Jalandhar and 118 km from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Phillaur
topPlaces.description: Phillaur is a town and a municipal council as well as a tehsil in Jalandhar district in the Indian state of Punjab. The city is situated 20 km from Ludhiana, 45 km from Jalandhar and 140 km from Amritsar.

topPlaces.name: Talwandi Kalan (Ludhiana West)
topPlaces.description: Talwandi Kalan is a village located in the Ludhiana West tehsil, of Ludhiana district, Punjab.

topPlaces.name: Panj Dhera
topPlaces.description: Allowal (Punjabi: ਆਲੌਵਾਲ) is a medium size village in Phillaur tehsil of Jalandhar District of Punjab State, India. It is located 5 km away from postal head office Phillaur, 14.8 km from Goraya, 48 km from Jalandhar and 111 km from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Burj Pukhta
topPlaces.description: Burj Pukhta or Burj Pukta, is a village in Phillaur tehsil of Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 3.3 km away from Nagar, 47.7 km from Jalandhar and 115 km from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Goindwal (Ludhiana West)
topPlaces.description: Goindwal is a village located in the Ludhiana West tehsil, of Ludhiana district, Punjab.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Phillaur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Phillaur Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Phillaur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Phillaur Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Phillaur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Phillaur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Phillaur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Phillaur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Garha, Phillaur, Achan Chak, Ramgarh, Jalandhar, Phillaur, Talwandi Kalan (Ludhiana West).
